use_cases: Landing page backgrounds for SaaS products to create visual impact
Hero section backgrounds for media and entertainment platforms
Animated decorative backgrounds for creator tools and creative portfolios
E-commerce site backgrounds for seasonal campaigns
Dynamic website backgrounds for portfolio and personal sites
ai_summary: An animated WebGL-based background shader component that renders continuous warp effects with geometric checkered patterns. Features swirl animations, shape distortion, and vibrant gradient colors (blues, purples, greens) with adjustable speed and iteration parameters. Designed to create immersive, visually engaging backgrounds for landing pages, hero sections, and creative portfolios across SaaS, media, and e-commerce platforms.
